products.title: Cargo Storage Containers
products.description: Secure, Durable, and Versatile Storage Solutions. Our Cargo Storage Containers are robust, weatherproof containers designed for safe and flexible storage of goods, materials, and equipment across industries. Built with the same strength and reliability as shipping containers, they offer an ideal storage solution for construction sites, warehouses, factories, and remote locations.
amenities: Built from durable steel with reinforced panels and flooring
Weather-resistant and pest-proof design
Robust locking mechanisms to safeguard your contents
Tamper-proof door designs
Easily transported and relocated with standard handling equipment
Stackable for optimized space utilization
Protects contents from rain, dust, and extreme temperatures
Suitable for indoor and outdoor use

products.title: ACP Security Cabins
products.description: Stylish. Modern. Premium Protection. Our ACP Security Cabins are designed for locations where both appearance and performance matter. Built with Aluminum Composite Panels (ACP), these cabins offer a sleek, modern finish while delivering all the essential features of a high-quality guard room. Perfect for malls, MNC offices, IT parks, expos, showrooms, and gated communities, these cabins enhance your property's security while blending seamlessly with premium surroundings.
amenities: Modern exterior with smooth, glossy finish
Weather-resistant and easy to maintain
Available in multiple color options to match your branding or architecture
Enhances the overall appearance of your entrance area
Framed using MS C-channels and square tubes for strength
Long-lasting, rust-resistant and suited for all climates
Glass wool insulation for thermal and sound control
MDF cladding with aluminum finishing on the inside for a polished feel

products.title: Cargo Office Containers
products.description: Transforming Shipping Containers into Efficient Office Spaces. Our Cargo Office Containers are expertly modified shipping containers designed to provide durable, secure, and portable office solutions. Perfect for construction sites, remote locations, industrial yards, or temporary setups, these containers combine the strength of cargo containers with the comfort and functionality of modern offices.
amenities: Made from heavy-duty cargo shipping containers with reinforced steel
Weatherproof, vandal-resistant, and built to last
Insulated walls and ceilings for temperature control
Windows, doors, and ventilation for natural light and air flow
Concealed electrical wiring, lighting, power outlets, and HVAC options
Ready to support computers, communication systems, and office equipment
Quick installation and setup with minimal groundwork
Easily transported and relocated as project needs evolve

Minimal installation time with plug-and-play usability

products.title: Portable Roof Solar Cabins
products.description: Reliable Power Wherever Electricity Isn’t Available. Our Portable Roof Solar Cabins provide an independent, eco-friendly power solution for remote locations, off-grid sites, construction camps, rural areas, and emergency setups where electricity supply is unavailable or unreliable. Designed with integrated solar panels on the roof, these cabins generate clean energy to power lighting, appliances, and essential equipment without the need for grid connections.
amenities: High-efficiency solar panels mounted on the cabin roof
Battery storage for power availability during nighttime or cloudy weather
Provides clean, uninterrupted power without dependence on external grids
Ideal for lighting, fans, communication devices, and essential electronics
Strong steel frame with insulated walls for weather resistance
Portable design for quick transport and setup in remote locations
Insulated interiors maintain comfortable temperatures
Equipped with LED lighting, electrical sockets, and wiring for easy use

products.title: Portable Panel Containers
products.description: Efficient, Secure, and Flexible Solutions for Factory Panel Installations. Our Portable Panel Containers are specially designed to serve as compact, secure, and weather-resistant enclosures for critical factory units such as IT servers, electrical panels, control systems, and communication hubs. Quick installation with minimal civil work required

products.description: Efficient, Comfortable, and Secure Accommodation for Your Workforce. Our Portable Labour Camp in Containers provides a smart, scalable, and mobile housing solution designed specifically for construction sites, mining projects, infrastructure development, and remote industrial locations. products.title: Portable Hospital Containers
products.description: Rapid Medical Infrastructure – Anytime, anywhere. Our Portable Hospital Containers are designed to deliver immediate, scalable medical facilities in times of health emergencies, outbreaks, or rural healthcare shortages. Whether in a village, urban overflow zone, or disaster-affected area, these containers can be deployed rapidly to provide ICU beds, general wards, isolation rooms, and ventilator-ready spaces — all within a compact, mobile structure.
amenities: Can be configured as ICU units, general beds, triage zones, or isolation wards
Option for attached toilet, washbasin, and oxygen line fitting
Pre-fabricated, plug-and-play design
Fully operational in less than 48 hours with minimal setup
Proven effective during COVID-19, dengue outbreaks, and health emergencies
Ideal for use in villages, towns, remote regions, and relief zones
Walls made of MS or GI with insulated cladding to maintain temperature
Washable ACP or PVC interiors for hygiene and infection control

products.title: GI Portable Office Cabins
products.description: Weatherproof. Rustproof. Built for Harsh Environments. Our GI Portable Office Cabins are engineered to perform in the toughest conditions — from coastal zones to high-rainfall and acidic environments. Made from high-quality galvanized steel (GI), these cabins are designed to resist rust, corrosion, and environmental damage, making them the ideal choice for sites exposed to frequent rain, sea air, and chemical-laden atmospheres.
amenities: Designed for stability and long-term outdoor use
Leak-proof roof with proper drainage
Comfortable working environment in any season
Supports AC, lighting, computers, and other office essentials
Zinc coating on GI sheets ensures natural rust resistance
Additional epoxy coatings can be added on request
Fully customizable layout, size, and accessories
Marine & Coastal Construction Projects

Designed using high-grade mild steel (MS) with durable materials and smart interiors, these cabins are built to withstand rough environments while offering a professional workspace on the go.

Comfortable working environment in any weather
MDF wall cladding with neat aluminum joints
Wooden vinyl carpet flooring for a premium office look
One coat of zinc chromate primer
Two coats of epoxy paint for long-term rust protection

products.title: Portable Double Decker Cabins
products.description: Twice the Space, Half the Footprint – Smart Vertical Accommodation. Our Portable Double Decker Cabins are engineered to deliver maximum space utilization in compact project areas. Designed for industrial sites, construction camps, mining areas, remote infrastructure projects, and high-density accommodations, these cabins offer two-level living or office solutions within a single ground footprint — making them ideal where space is limited but functionality is essential.
amenities: Double the usable area without additional ground space
Ideal for tight project sites and high-occupancy needs
Fabricated using MS C-channel & square tube frame
Engineered to support safe stacking and upper-level load
Finished with MDF/ACP wall cladding, vinyl or tiled flooring, and false ceiling
Bunk beds, wardrobes, lighting, ventilation, and air conditioning provision
Attached toilets and pantry optional on either floor
External or internal staircase based on usage

products.title: Portable Bunkhouse Cabins
products.description: Smart Living in No-Build Zones – Move-In Ready Homes. Our Portable Bunkhouse Cabins are the perfect solution for areas where permanent construction is restricted, such as green zones, forest fringes, agricultural lands, and environmentally sensitive regions. These cabins offer a complete residential setup — including bedroom, hall, kitchen, balcony, and seating area — in a portable, prefabricated structure that requires no civil permissions for setup.
amenities: Includes bedroom, hall, kitchen, bathroom, and balcony with seating
Designed for comfort, privacy, and functionality
Ideal for green zones, forest-adjacent land, and temporary use
Classified as movable structures, not permanent buildings
Built on MS/GI steel frames with insulated wall panels
Designed for lift-and-shift deployment, no foundation required
Glass wool or rock wool insulation for heat and sound protection
Leakproof roofing and ventilation system included

about.history: Hindustan Portable Cabins is a leading and fast-growing manufacturer of high-quality portable cabins in India. Since our inception in 2010, we have proudly completed 15 successful years in the industry, earning a strong reputation for excellence, innovation, and reliability.
about.mission: To deliver high-quality portable solutions that meet diverse industry needs with excellence in design, durability, and timely delivery.
about.vision: To become a global leader in portable space solutions, setting new benchmarks in quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction.
about.ceoMessage: We specialize in designing and manufacturing portable office containers, site cabins, security cabins, and customized modular solutions. Our cabins are trusted across India and internationally.

industries.title: Infrastructure & Construction
industries.desc: Office containers, workforce accommodation, and site cabins for highways, metros, and industrial projects.

industries.title: Renewable Energy
industries.desc: Portable solutions for solar plants, wind farms, and remote energy project sites.

industries.title: Mining & Heavy Industry
industries.desc: Durable modular units for mining operations, steel plants, and remote industrial zones.

testimonials.name: Jindal Steel Power Ltd.
testimonials.quote: Hindustan Portable Cabins has been a trusted partner for over 10 years, supplying high-quality office cabins, security cabins, toilets, and accommodation units for our Angul, Odisha plant. Their durable and well-designed portable solutions have consistently met our needs for staff and labor facilities. We value their commitment to quality, timely delivery, and excellent service, making them a reliable collaborator in our operations.

testimonials.name: L&T Constructions
testimonials.quote: Hindustan Portable Cabins has been our preferred supplier for portable office cabins across all our major projects in India, including Bangalore, Hyderabad, Patna, and Visakhapatnam. Their cabins have enabled us to quickly and efficiently set up offices at construction yards for metro, road, tunnel, and dam projects. The quality, durability, and ease of installation have greatly supported our project operations. We appreciate their consistent service and reliable products.

testimonials.name: NCC Limited
testimonials.quote: Hindustan Portable Cabins has consistently supplied us with high-quality portable containers across all our projects in India. Their competitive pricing and superior quality set them apart from other vendors. With multiple manufacturing units strategically located, they ensure low transportation costs and timely bulk deliveries—even in emergency situations—helping us kickstart our projects smoothly. We trust and prefer Hindustan Portable Cabins as our supplier for both current and future projects.

testimonials.name: HG Infra Eng Ltd
testimonials.quote: Hindustan Portable Cabins has been a reliable supplier for our projects across Bihar, Andhra Pradesh, and Odisha. Their quality portable cabins have met our requirements for office, accommodation, and site facilities, supporting smooth project execution. We appreciate their timely delivery and consistent service, making them a valued partner in our infrastructure endeavors.

testimonials.quote: We have used Hindustan Portable Cabins for our project sites to establish offices and staff accommodations. Their products are well-built and provide great comfort and durability.
